title: rhynchelythrum ascendens
side_effects: Rhynchelythrum ascendens can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of glycosides. Prolonged consumption of the plant may also lead to kidney damage and reduced kidney function. In addition, Rhynchelythrum ascendens can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and anaphylaxis, in some individuals. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, it may also interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse effects.
